matrix.notes: Client::new() default preserves behavior (E3). Integration tests verify output format unchanged.
All 7 improvements implemented. Maturity re-assessment needed to confirm 3.0 score.
4 new crates added (tracing, tracing-subscriber, serial_test, mockito). Budget met. Justification comments in Cargo.toml.
No tokio in dependency tree. mockito used for integration tests. TN2 validated.
Client::with_base_url() implemented (E2). Integration tests use mockito Server URL (E7, E8).
97/97 tests pass including previously failing load_api_key_ignores_empty_env_var (E1).
validation.rs uses warn-only pattern. Tests confirm known values pass without warning (E17).
tracing_subscriber configured with_writer(std::io::stderr) (E10). stdout remains JSON-only.
--no-cache flag added to CLI (E22). Cache bypassed when flag is set.
--verbose flag added (E11). Default log level is warn. RUST_LOG env var supported via EnvFilter.
Warnings include valid values list via tracing::warn! fields (E16, E17).
CI audit job uses continue-on-error: true (E13). Audit failures don't block.
Cache files use 0o600 permissions (E21, E23). Test verifies permission bits.
CI triggers on push to main and all PRs (E12). No manual-only path.
CI runs fmt + clippy + test + audit (E14, E18). Makefile has lint and audit targets (E19).
Test/fmt/clippy failures hard-block CI. Audit uses continue-on-error (E13).
6 fixture files in tests/fixtures/ derived from API response schema (E6). Integration tests load fixtures.

genealogy.notes: O4 (challenger: assumption) is an INVARIANT — convergence risk. API schema stability assumed but unverified. Fixtures are snapshot-based; manual re-capture is the mitigation.

binding_constraint.notes: Binding constraint RT-2 (configurable base URL) is fully addressed. with_base_url() implemented and tested.

reversibility.notes: All 7 steps are TWO_WAY. No irreversible changes.

propagation.notes: No VIOLATED propagation effects. All TIGHTENED constraints remain satisfiable.
